headline: Visa Canton Role Signals Onchain Settlement And Possible Valuation Upside
summary: Visa (NYSE:V) has joined the Canton Network as the first major global payments company to act as a "Super Validator". As a Super Validator, Visa will help secure, govern, and scale a privacy-focused blockchain infrastructure tailored to financial institutions. This move extends Visa's digital asset and onchain settlement capabilities into regulated, institution-grade blockchain payments. For a company that sits at the center of global card payments, Visa's role on the Canton Network...

headline: 2 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stocks to Research Further and 1 Facing Challenges
summary: The stocks in this article have caught Wall Street’s attention in a big way, with price targets implying returns above 20%. But investors should take these forecasts with a grain of salt because analysts typically say nice things about companies so their firms can win business in other product lines like M&A advisory.

headline: Assessing Visa (V) Valuation After The New Ingenico Payments Partnership
summary: Why the Ingenico partnership has Visa (V) back in focus Visa (V) is back on many watchlists after announcing a collaboration with Ingenico that links Ingenico's AXIUM smart POS terminals to the Visa Acceptance Platform, including gateway and risk management services. This tie up aims to shorten time to market for merchants, simplify in store payment certifications, and support omnichannel use cases across enterprise retail, small and medium businesses, restaurants, and third party...
